pkgmetadata.longdescription: Claude Desktop is the official desktop application for Claude, an AI assistant by Anthropic. This binary package repackages the official Linux build maintained by the upstream community.

use.flag: Pull in dev-util/claude-code so the bundled Claude Code integration can spawn the CLI
Pull in app-emulation/qemu and app-emulation/virtiofsd so Claude Desktop's Cowork feature can boot its sandbox microVM
On Wayland sessions, add media-gfx/gnome-screenshot for Computer Use screenshots under GNOME (only versions before 1.18286.0_p3; later versions bundle gnome-portal-bridge)

Add residual Computer Use fallbacks for Wayland sessions without a bundled bridge: x11-misc/ydotool for exotic compositors (requires ydotoold daemon running) and, from 1.18286.0_p3 on, media-gfx/imagemagick for KDE below Plasma 6.6
Add media-gfx/scrot, x11-misc/wmctrl, and x11-misc/xdotool for Computer Use on X11 (only versions before 1.18286.0_p3; later versions bundle x11-bridge)
